stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying under VFR on a track of 168°(M). The highest obstacle within 5 NM of the intended track of the aircraft is 4290 ft elevation.
Given the following information, provided by an aerodrome at 1400 ft elevation, what is the minimum flight level to give 1000 ft obstacle clearance?

QNH: 1026 hPa
Temperatare: ISA -12°C
Assume 1 hPa = 30 ft
